name: liquidshield
description: Cross-chain liquidation defense hook for Uniswap v4 on Unichain

scripts.deploy:unichain: cd packages/contracts && forge script script/DeployAll.s.sol --broadcast --rpc-url unichain_sepolia
scripts.deploy:arbitrum: cd packages/contracts && ADAPTER_TYPE=aave forge script script/DeploySourceChain.s.sol --broadcast --rpc-url arbitrum_sepolia
scripts.deploy:ethereum: cd packages/contracts && ADAPTER_TYPE=morpho forge script script/DeploySourceChain.s.sol --broadcast --rpc-url ethereum_sepolia

author: Yudhishthra & Team
